titleStmt.title: SII 28.144: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 144. (A.R. No. 299 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.
Records a royal order issued at the request of kōṉ to have the following transaction taken on record in the tiru-kkai-oṭṭi and also to have it inscribed in the tirumāḷigai.

The transaction pertained to the endowment of land out of her kāṇi and some other land purchased (by her) to the temple, to be held and managed by the temple (tirunāmattukkāṇi) for supplying flowers to the tiruppū-maṇḍapam of the temple daily. With the balance of the proceeds after paying kaḍamai where the concerned land was liable to pay it or for the fund (uḍal) from the yield of such land that had been freed from the kaḍamai liability, by Gaṅgai-koṇḍāḷ, the aḻagi of the Uḍaiyāṉ of

1. In between lines 12-13, the following is inscribed in smaller characters nilam kālil kuḻi m tirunantavaṉañ ceytu ṉāḷ oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi tiruppaḷḷittāmamaḷantu vaṭakaṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉuyyakkoṇṭipāṇa Kuṇamalaippuram in Veṇṇi-kkūṟṟam. One Kundaṉ īlaṅkēśvaraṇ, the uḍaiyāṉ of āraśūr in ā1ṟkāṭṭu-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vāḷanāḍu is also mentioned (ṣee ṇo. 145 below).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭu nāḷ patiṉālu toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum
madhurān=taka brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku sāmutāyattirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalap pallavaraiyaṉum śrīkāriyañ cey
vārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi
Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkup pāṇṭiyakulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu Aracūruṭaiyāṉ kuntaṉāṉa Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ viru vaḷanāṭṭu ve
ṇṇik kūṟṟattu kuṇamalaippuram Uṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiyāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭāḷ taṉkāṇiyāṉa nilattut tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka tanta viruta
rājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkānāṭṭu Ulakuyyakkoṇṭa coḻacaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻanallū Etirili coḻa
nallūril Ā Āṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ kulottuṅkacoḻa raiyaṉum ceṅkāṭ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal kulottuṅka coḻappa
ḻuveṭṭaraiyaṉ Iṟaiyiliyāy Ivaṉukku Iṟukkavum vilai koṇṭa A pe ṭikaṇṭar kaṇṭavatikku vāṉavaṉmātevi
vāykkālukkut teṟkum Aiñcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu tum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catirattu nilam Oṉpatu ṉ kiḻāṟumā Arai
kkāṇikkiḻ Oṉpatumākkāṇiyum kamuku nilam Arai kkiḻ kiḻaraiyum Āka nilam pa mā muntirikaik kiḻaraiye kkāṇikkiḻ
mukkāle nālumākkāṇiyiṉāl pottakappaṭi nilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle Orumāvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻorumā Arai muntiri
Itil kaṭamai Iṟukkum nilattukku Iṟaimikutiyā ḷḷutum Iṟaiyili nilattāluḷḷa Uṭaluṅ koṇṭu to ṉkā vitta ceṅ
kaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷittāmam nāḷtoṟum tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalāka Eṇṇavum Iṉnilattukku Ivaḷ tanta sātaṉam tirukkai Oṭṭiyile
Oṭukkavum Iṉṉilam palavaravaiyoṭuṅ kūṭṭa Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavuṅ kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu
koṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai rājendraci
ṅka muventa veḷāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Eṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai viḻiñattaraiyaṉeḻutte
ṉṟum Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Irācarāca viḻupparaiyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai ṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai cittarāya
ṉeḻutteṉṟum prasātañ ceytaruḷiṉa ceyyum paṭippaṭi kalveṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
